brainstorm.description: Use before any creative work - explores user intent, requirements and design before implementation
brainstorm.prompt: Read and follow the skill at .claude/skills/superpowers/brainstorming/SKILL.md. Announce: 'Using brainstorming skill.' Then proceed with the task.

write-plan.description: Use when you have spec/requirements for a multi-step task, before touching code
write-plan.prompt: Read and follow the skill at .claude/skills/superpowers/writing-plans/SKILL.md. Announce: 'Using writing-plans skill.' Then proceed with the task.
